name: Yjs Document
description: Collaborative document editing with character-by-character Yjs sync
details: Real-time collaborative document editor using Yjs with character-level diffing. Unlike useYjsText which replaces the entire text on every keystroke, this feature computes minimal inserts and deletes from input events so that concurrent edits merge cleanly. Demonstrates useYjsField for raw Y.Doc access, Y.Text observation for remote changes, and ownership-based CRUD for document management.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { yjsDocSchema } from './schemas/yjs-doc-schema'
Add to App.tsx: import YjsDocPage from './pages/YjsDocPage'
patterns: Y.Text.insert(pos, chars) / Y.Text.delete(pos, len) -> character-level ops
Input event diffing -> minimal Yjs operations per keystroke
